findings: Strong pairwise correlations among features indicate redundancy likely due to measurement or protocol semantics.
Low cardinality and near-constant values in features like Fwd Header Length and Avg Fwd Segment Size support semantic origin of dependencies.
Local consistency verification revealed label neighborhood conflicts and duplicate label conflicts, indicating some local irregularities in label topology despite strong dependencies.
contradictions: Local label neighborhood conflicts and duplicate label conflicts around Fwd Header Length indicate unresolved local inconsistencies.
limitations: Analysis limited to local evidence within the dependency cluster; global aggregation or cross-cluster synthesis not performed.
